title: Family Law – Assistance in Difficult Cases
description: Divorce, maintenance (alimony), parental responsibility, division of matrimonial property – Specter & Associates Law Firm in Warsaw offers discreet and professional legal assistance in family law matters.
content:
Family Law – Legal Support During Life's Most Difficult Moments

Family law cases are among the most emotionally demanding legal proceedings. Divorce, separation, disputes over custody of children or division of assets are situations that require not only legal expertise but also a compassionate approach. Specter & Associates Law Firm in Warsaw handles family cases with full dedication, safeguarding the interests of our clients and – above all – the welfare of any children involved.

Divorce – We Guide You Through the Entire Process

Divorce proceedings are a multi-stage legal process that can take anywhere from a few months to several years, depending on the degree of conflict between the spouses. Our lawyers handle:

  • Uncontested divorce – where both spouses agree on the divorce and ancillary matters, we help prepare an amicable solution and expedite the proceedings,
  • Contested divorce with attribution of fault – where establishing one spouse's fault has legal and financial consequences, we provide full representation throughout the trial,
  • Legal separation – as an alternative to divorce for spouses who do not wish to dissolve the marriage definitively.

We handle all stages of the proceedings: preparing the petition, gathering evidence, representing you at hearings, and conducting settlement negotiations.

Maintenance (Alimony) – Assessment and Enforcement

Maintenance obligations apply not only to children but may also extend to a former spouse. We help clients:

  • establish a maintenance amount appropriate to the needs of the claimant and the means of the paying party,
  • file a petition for maintenance or for a variation of the existing maintenance order,
  • enforce maintenance payments from a defaulting payer, including through the Alimony Fund,
  • recover arrears of maintenance payments.

We fight to ensure that our clients' children have the financial means for a dignified life and development.

Parental Responsibility and Contact With the Child

Cases involving children are the most sensitive and important. We deal with:

  • Establishing the child's place of residence – determining with which parent the child will primarily live,
  • Regulating contact arrangements – schedules for visits, holidays, public holidays, and digital communication,
  • Restriction or withdrawal of parental responsibility – where the child's welfare is at risk,
  • Adoption and guardianship matters – adoption proceedings, legal guardianship, curatorship.

Division of Matrimonial Property After Divorce

The division of the spouses' joint property can be carried out by agreement or through the courts. We advise and represent clients in matters involving:

  • division of real estate, savings, vehicles and other assets,
  • accounting for contributions from separate property to joint property and vice versa,
  • establishing unequal shares in joint property,
  • division of a business or shares in companies.

We handle all cases with discretion and commitment. We invite you to a free initial consultation at Specter & Associates in Warsaw.
